mapper.sql: report_id, user_id, laboratory_id, lab_reservation_id, status, created_at, description, images
mapper.insert: insert into fault_report_lab (report_id, user_id, laboratory_id, lab_reservation_id, status, created_at, description, images) values (#{report_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lab_reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{images,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into fault_report_lab
report_id,
user_id,
laboratory_id,
lab_reservation_id,
status,
created_at,
description,
images,
#{report_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{lab_reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{images,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update fault_report_lab
user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lab_reservation_id = #{lab_reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
images = #{images,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where report_id = #{report_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update fault_report_lab set user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lab_reservation_id = #{lab_reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, images = #{images,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where report_id = #{report_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
from fault_report_lab where laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status = '可能发生故障'
